scripts.build:cf: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root='.open-next';const copyDir=(src,dst)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(src)) return;fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});};copyDir('public', root);copyDir(path.join('.next','static'), path.join(root,'_next','static'));const wsrc=path.join(root,'worker.js');const wdst=path.join(root,'_worker.js');if(!fs.existsSync(wsrc)) throw new Error('Missing '+wsrc);fs.copyFileSync(wsrc, wdst);if(fs.existsSync(wsrc+'.map')) fs.copyFileSync(wsrc+'.map', wdst+'.map');"
scripts.deploy: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root='.open-next';const copyDir=(src,dst)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(src)) return;fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});};copyDir('public', root);copyDir(path.join('.next','static'), path.join(root,'_next','static'));const wsrc=path.join(root,'worker.js');const wdst=path.join(root,'_worker.js');if(!fs.existsSync(wsrc)) throw new Error('Missing '+wsrc);fs.copyFileSync(wsrc, wdst);if(fs.existsSync(wsrc+'.map')) fs.copyFileSync(wsrc+'.map', wdst+'.map');" && wrangler deploy
scripts.preview: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root='.open-next';const copyDir=(src,dst)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(src)) return;fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});};copyDir('public', root);copyDir(path.join('.next','static'), path.join(root,'_next','static'));const wsrc=path.join(root,'worker.js');const wdst=path.join(root,'_worker.js');if(!fs.existsSync(wsrc)) throw new Error('Missing '+wsrc);fs.copyFileSync(wsrc, wdst);if(fs.existsSync(wsrc+'.map')) fs.copyFileSync(wsrc+'.map', wdst+'.map');" && wrangler dev
